gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 一部用错位语音留言编织的浪漫奇遇，笑中带泪的治愈之作。
gems.whyWatchEn: A romantic comedy that turns mistaken voicemails into a heartfelt, cross-distance connection—fresh and unexpectedly moving.
gems.audience: 喜欢非传统浪漫故事、偏爱小清新治愈风格的观众。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of unconventional romance and heartwarming indie comedies.
